subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! God willing, mayest thou be blessed through divine favor. The letter of the Afnán, upon him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز باشی نامه افنان علیه بهائی و
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the power of words; of speech
